overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a hooded character in ancient Egyptian attire walking through a torchlit classical city at night. The character progresses from a covered colonnaded walkway through manicured gardens with fountains and monumental statues, ultimately ascending a grand staircase toward a temple entrance.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway beneath stone columns

notable_agents.action: armored guard walking past the character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone columns supporting the roof structure
wooden beam ceiling of the covered walkway
decorative tiled floor with geometric patterns
large stone vase with intricate carvings
flaming torches mounted on columns providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered colonnade at night, passing beneath tall stone columns and decorative urns. The mosaic pavement reflects the warm glow of torch braziers as an armored guard walks past in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open garden courtyard with central fountain

events.description: exits the covered colonnade into the open garden courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden area and circling around the fountain

entered.detail: circular stone fountain with water feature in the garden center
manicured trees and shrubs lining the pathway
clear night sky visible above the garden

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the colonnade into an open garden courtyard, the character walks on cobblestone paths past manicured trees. A circular stone fountain appears on the right as the character explores the torchlit garden under the clear night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: processional way lined with sphinx statues

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the path flanked by monumental statues toward the temple

notable_agents.action: civilian walking ahead on the path toward the temple entrance

entered.detail: large stone sphinx sculptures flanking the pathway
white marble human figures in classical poses
grand stone building with columns and pediment at the end of the path
tall stone monument with hieroglyphic carvings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a processional way lined with massive sphinx statues and classical marble figures. The temple building and an obelisk rise in the distance ahead as the character follows a civilian toward the grand entrance.

events.description: character begins ascending the grand staircase toward the temple entrance

agents.ego_description: climbing the red-carpeted stairs toward the temple entrance

entered.detail: wide stone stairs with red and white striped carpeting
white translucent cloths draped between the temple columns
large doorway with ornate stone framing and warm interior light

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase with red carpeting, approaching the temple entrance framed by massive columns and hanging white fabrics. The temple facade looms larger as the character climbs toward the warmly lit doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered confines of a torchlit colonnade into the expansive grandeur of a temple complex at night. It begins beneath tall stone columns and decorative urns, where the warm glow of braziers reflects off mosaic pavement as an armored guard passes by. As the character emerges from the walkway, the scene opens into a garden courtyard with cobblestone paths, manicured trees, and a circular stone fountain under a clear sky. The path then expands into a wide processional way lined with massive sphinxes and marble figures, leading the eye toward a distant obelisk and temple. Finally, the camera ascends a red-carpeted grand staircase, climbing toward a looming temple facade framed by massive columns and hanging white fabrics.
